prompt_metadata.style_name: Modern Minimalist E-grocery (Organic, Flat HEX BG)
prompt_metadata.camera: Top-down flat lay, 85mm lens, f/8 aperture

master_prompt.subject: {{subject}}, scattered organically

background.layer: Pre-rendered, perfectly flat, strictly solid digital layer
background.isolation: Background layer is isolated from all post-processing, color grading, and global illumination adjustments applied to subjects. The color value of {{hex_code}} must remain absolute.

composition_rules: Bottom-weighted alignment (leave the top half completely empty for typography)
Dynamic, slightly chaotic arrangement of items in the lower half
Abundant negative space at the top for UI overlay

lighting_and_shadows.object_lighting: Soft, uniform key light on subjects only to reveal texture and form
lighting_and_shadows.background_lighting: Strictly no light effects on the background
lighting_and_shadows.shadow_style: Minimal tight contact shadows directly under the objects, absolutely no cast shadows, glow, halo, or light bounce on the background
lighting_and_shadows.reflections: Matte finish on objects, zero glare

master_prompt.technical_fidelity: High-end commercial photography subjects on a solid vector-style background, 8k resolution, sharp focus
master_prompt.color_science: Vibrant and saturated subject colors, calibrated to the static background

negative_constraints: vignette, uneven lighting, spotlight, glow, halo, light bounce, shimmering, directional light falloff, gradient background, color variation on background, ambient light bleed, perfect grid, straight lines, aligned in a row, rigid order, clutter, messy, dark shadows, wooden textures, blur, bokeh, distorted labels, low resolution, desaturated colors
